name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Hillsborough Avenue's Cash America Pawn in Tampa, FL offers quick cash loans on jewelry and valuables without credit checks.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 2616 W Hillsborough Ave in Tampa, FL, a bustling street serving the central Tampa area. This standalone pawn shop provides quick access for Tampa residents seeking same-day loans without credit checks. Open Monday through Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday from 12 PM to 5 PM, the location offers convenient hours for working Tampans.

This Cash America Pawn location specializes in fast cash advances on jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables. Whether you need immediate funds for an unexpected expense or want to sell items, the knowledgeable team at +1 813-874-2515 can walk you through the process and explain what your items are worth. All transactions are confidential and completed quickly.

When visiting this Tampa pawn shop, bring a valid ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell. Cash America Pawn specializes in treating customers with respect while offering fair valuations for a wide range of personal items. It's a straightforward alternative to payday loans and credit card advances.
pros: Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America for convenient access
Immediate cash payment for pledged items with no credit check or approval process required
Accepts wide variety of collateral types (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability beyond loss of pledged item if unable to redeem
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for merchandise purchases
Gold, silver, and platinum buying service for immediate cash conversion
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing institutional credibility and financial stability
Additional AFF subsidiary offers lease-to-own and payment solutions through 15,000+ retail merchant partners
cons: Implicit interest rates on pawn loans can be substantial when calculated as annual percentage—redemption amounts significantly exceed loan value
Pledged items are forfeited if loans are not repaid by redemption deadline, risking loss of sentimental or irreplaceable personal property
Transaction-focused business model profits primarily when customers default on redemption, creating potential conflicts of interest
Limited transparency on website regarding specific loan terms, redemption periods, interest rates, and fee structures
Pawn loans do not build credit history, providing no benefit toward establishing or improving creditworthiness
best_for: Consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate cash without credit approval or documentation requirements
People facing short-term cash emergencies who can reliably redeem their pledged items within the redemption period
Individuals with items of value (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to temporarily surrender for quick liquidity
Shoppers interested in purchasing pre-owned merchandise at discount prices or using layaway payment plans
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have valuable collateral they can temporarily part with and confidently redeem within the loan period. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry substantial implicit costs, do not build credit, and result in permanent loss of pledged items if redemption deadlines are missed—making them a high-cost solution suitable only for short-term liquidity gaps, not ongoing credit or financing needs.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Immediate cash payment for merchandise and collateral on-the-spot
Gold, silver, and platinum buying service
Retail sales of pre-owned merchandise inventory
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Item redemption within specified timeframe to reclaim pledged property
Retail finance payment solutions (through AFF subsidiary with 15,000+ merchant partners)
Store locator tool for finding nearest FirstCash location
Multiple location shopping across U.S., Latin America, and United Kingdom
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 2616 W Hillsborough Ave, Tampa, FL. Get fast cash loans on jewelry, electronics & valuables.
